heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1130b Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a). , substituted “such sums as may be necessary” for “$11,000,000”, “2009” for “1999”, and “five” for “4”.Pub. L. 110–315, § 611(c)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “such sums as may be necessary” for “$7,000,000”, “2009” for “1999”, and “five” for “4”.Pub. L. 110–315, § 611(c)(2)1998— substituted “1999” for “1993” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 105–2441992— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows:Pub. L. 102–325“(a) There are authorized to be appropriated $7,500,000 for the fiscal year 1988 and for each of the 4 succeeding fiscal years to carry out the provisions of .section 1130–1 of this title“(b) There are authorized to be appropriated $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1987, and such sums as may be necessary for the 4 succeeding fiscal years, to carry out the provisions of .”section 1130a of this title1990—Subsec. (a). substituted “$7,500,000” for “$5,000,000” and “4 succeeding” for “3 succeeding”.Pub. L. 101–6001988—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1987, and such sums as may be necessary for the 4 succeeding fiscal years.”Pub. L. 100–418, § 62621986— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated $7,500,000 for fiscal year 1981 and for each of the succeeding fiscal years ending prior to , to carry out the provisions of this part.”Pub. L. 99–498October 1, 1985

children.heading: Centers for international business education
children.label: a Centers for international business education
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the fiscal year 2009 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the five succeeding fiscal years to carry out the provisions of .section 1130–1 of this title

children.heading: Education and training programs
children.label: b Education and training programs
